{% extends "layouts/main-external.html" %} {% set pageName="Your licences" %} {% block content %}

{{ pageName }}

{% set licenceRows = [] %} {% for licence in data.licences %} {% set licenceRows = licenceRows | push([ { html: '' + licence.number + '' }, { text: licence.name }, { text: licence.endDate } ]) %} {% endfor %} {{ govukTable({ head: [ { text: "Licence" }, { text: "Licence name" }, { text: "End date" } ], rows: licenceRows }) }}
{% endblock %}
